zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Latham於1365年出生在英國藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可時，她的父親Thomas de Lathom35歲，母親Isabel Pilkington0歲。她於大約1385年與Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1414年10月26日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Latham于1365年出生在英国藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可时，她的父亲Thomas de Lathom35岁，母亲Isabel Pilkington0岁。她于大约1385年与Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1414年10月26日在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Latham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

variants.name: Laden
meanings: German: from a shortened form of Ladengast ‘invite the guest’, a nickname for an innkeeper.
German: from von der Laden, a nickname for a joiner or for the keeper of a shrine or the chest of a guild, from Middle Low German lade ‘chest’.
English: variant of   Latham  .

variants.name: Leathem
meanings: Irish (northern): variant of   Latham  .
Irish: variant of   Lydon  .

variants.name: Leatham
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Latham  .

variants.name: Lathan
meanings: English (mainly northeastern counties): variant of   Latham  .

variants.name: Lathem
meanings: English: variant of   Latham  .

variants.name: Ledden
meanings: English: variant of   Latham  .
Irish: variant of   Lydon  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Latham was born in 1365, in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, her father, Thomas de Lathom, was 35 and her mother, Isabel Pilkington, was 0. She married Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD about 1385, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 26 October 1414, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Latham est née en 1365, à Ormskirk, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Lathom, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabel Pilkington, avait 0 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD environ 1385, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 octobre 1414, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Ormskirk, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Latham 1365 in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Lathom 35 und ihre Mutter Isabel Pilkington 0. Sie hat um 1385 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Oktober 1414 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Latham è nata il nel 1365 nel Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Thomas de Lathom, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Isabel Pilkington, aveva 0 anni. Lei sposato Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD circa 1385, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 ottobre 1414, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Lathamが1365年にイギリスランカシュアイアオルムスキルクで生まれた時，父Thomas de Lathomは35歳，母Isabel Pilkingtonは0歳であった。約1385年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでSir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORDと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1414年10月26日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアオルムスキルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Latham(이)가 1365년 영국 랭카실르 오스커크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Lathom(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Pilkington(은)는 0세였다. 그녀는 대략 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1414년 10월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 오스커크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Latham nasceu em 1365, em Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Lathom, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Pilkington, tinha 0 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD aproximadamente 1385, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1414, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Latham родилась в 1365 г. в местности ормскирк, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Lathom было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Pilkington, 0. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John II Knight Baron of Lathom Stanley LORD около 1385 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 октября 1414 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности ормскирк, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
